message:
test(pt-common): expand no-mock coverage for config/policy validation

policy.rs: 3→64 tests (Policy validate, LossRow/LossMatrix finite checks, Guardrails patterns/regex,
RobotMode bounds, FdrControl alpha, SignatureFastPath threshold, LoadAwareDecision all fields,
PatternKind/FdrMethod/ConfidenceLevel serde, defaults for all sub-structs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
